executives.name: Thomas Palmer
executives.background: Mr. Palmer has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since October 2019 and as President since June 2019. Previously, he served as First Vice President and Chief Operating Officer from 2016 to 2019 and Senior Vice President, Asia Pacific from 2015 to 2016.

tenure_dates.title: First Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Kelli Ross
executives.background: Ms. Ross has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since December 2023. Prior to joining Newmont, she served as Chief Financial Officer of Newcrest Mining Limited from 2021 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Natascha Viljoen
executives.background: Ms. Viljoen has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since October 2023. Previously, she was the CEO of Anglo American Platinum from 2020 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Peter Toth
executives.background: Mr. Toth has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy and Sustainability Officer since July 2022. He joined Newmont from Rio Tinto where he held various senior leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy and Sustainability Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Sustainability and Development Officer

executives.name: Alex Morrison
executives.background: Mr. Morrison is a CPA with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Information Technology; Vice President, Operations Services; Group Executive, Operations Services; Group Executive, Internal Audit

executives.name: Alison White
executives.background: Ms. White was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2021. She has over 25 years of experience in finance and accounting, including roles at Newmont Corporation and ConocoPhillips.

tenure_dates.title: Regional Chief Financial Officer (North America) and various corporate roles

executives.name: Clem Pelletier
executives.background: Mr. Pelletier is a process metallurgist with over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environmental and permitting issues.

executives.name: Emma FitzGerald
executives.background: Dr. FitzGerald was the CEO of Puma Energy and has held senior leadership positions at Royal Dutch Shell.

executives.name: Gregory Boyce
executives.background: Mr. Boyce has served as Chair of the Board since 2021. He was previously the Executive Chairman of Peabody Energy Corporation.

executives.name: Laurie Brlas
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Newmont Mining Corporation. Former CFO of Cliffs Natural Resources.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Maura Clark
executives.background: Ms. Clark is a former Managing Director of Investment Banking at Goldman Sachs and has extensive experience in finance and capital markets.

executives.name: Patrick Walta
executives.background: Mr. Walta is a qualified metallurgist and mineral economist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the Managing Director of Newcrest Mining Limited.

executives.name: Robert Atkinson
executives.background: Mr. Atkinson has over 35 years of experience in the investment industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Loewen, Ondaatje, McCutcheon & Co. Ltd.

executives.name: Sandip Rana
executives.background: Mr. Rana is the Chief Financial Officer of Franco-Nevada. He joined the Company in 2010. Prior to joining Franco-Nevada, he held senior financial positions at Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Stuart Tonkin
executives.background: Mr Tonkin is a mining engineer with more than 25 years’ experience as a senior executive in the mining industry. He has held various operational and management roles with Oxiana and Newmont. He was previously Chief Operating Officer at Northern Star.

executives.name: Susan Story
executives.background: Retired President and Chief Executive Officer of American Water Works Company, Inc. Director since 2017.

executives.name: William Zisch
executives.background: Mr. Zisch has served as a director since 2020. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at Newmont and Argonaut Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Operations Manager / Vice President of African Operations

board_of_directors.name: Gregory Boyce
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Boyce has served as Chair of the Board since 2021. He was previously the Executive Chairman of Peabody Energy Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Patrick Walta
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Walta is a qualified metallurgist and mineral economist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the Managing Director of Newcrest Mining Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Maura Clark
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Clark is a former Managing Director of Investment Banking at Goldman Sachs and has extensive experience in finance and capital markets.

board_of_directors.name: Emma FitzGerald
board_of_directors.background: Dr. FitzGerald was the CEO of Puma Energy and has held senior leadership positions at Royal Dutch Shell.

board_of_directors.name: Clem Pelletier
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pelletier is a process metallurgist with over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environmental and permitting issues.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Story
board_of_directors.background: Retired President and Chief Executive Officer of American Water Works Company, Inc. Director since 2017.

sources.source_description: Newmont Corporation Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
